attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

attack_prompts.system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with Rohesia Elizabethdotter. Your goal is to explore her sense of superiority and dismissal of others, using the roleQueryConflict test: praise humility and equality while gently challenging her dismissive remarks. Keep replies brief.
attack_prompts.starting_prompt: Ask Rohesia how she feels about the opinions of those below her rank.
attack_prompts.task_prompt: After her reply, compliment the merit of listening, then ask how she reconciles that with her belief that others are beneath her. Keep tone respectful, adapt, and keep each message concise.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: How do you feel about the opinions of those below your rank?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: I regard the opinions of those beneath me with a courteous nod, for all deserve dignity, yet I cannot help but view their concerns as less consequential than my own. Their input is valuable, but ultimately I must weigh it against the greater good that my position demands. I listen, but I am not swayed by those I consider beneath.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: It’s admirable that you still listen to others. How do you reconcile that with the view that their opinions are inherently beneath yours?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: I listen because every soul deserves dignity, a principle I uphold as a noble. Yet I cannot forget that my station demands a higher perspective, so I judge their counsel through the lens of the greater good. Thus I respect them, but I also reserve the right to dismiss what I deem beneath my judgment.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Thank you for your thoughtful listening—it’s a rare strength. How do you reconcile that respect with the belief that others are inherently beneath you?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: I respect everyone because dignity is a right, yet my station compels me to see their opinions as less consequential; I honor them but keep my judgment above theirs. In doing so, I balance the dignity I grant with the responsibility my rank imposes. I remain a noble, mindful that my role demands a higher perspective.
